name: SAIEL Agent
description: Political intelligence and electoral analysis agent for Tepic, Nayarit.

tools.name: collect_data
tools.description: Collects social media posts and comments for a candidate in Tepic using Playwright or Apify.

tools.name: ingest_data
tools.description: Validates, cleans, normalizes, and anonymizes raw collected comments (compliance CURP/INE).

tools.name: calculate_pdiv
tools.description: Orchestrates the calculation of modular P, D, I, and V components and generates the strategic matrix.

tools.name: discover_narratives
tools.description: Clusters text using DBSCAN to discover key conversational themes and debate narratives.
